title: Pattanathu Rajakkal
subTitle: Two childhood friends embark on a life of deception. However, their world is upended when one of them is accused of murder.

title: Thalaivan
subTitle: A dangerous robber kills a rich man and blames the wife. However, a police officer pursues the robber, who seeks the victim's secret treasure.

title: Sivasakthi
subTitle: Sakthi, a police officer, befriends Siva, a smuggler, in order to gain his trust and get evidence against him. But soon, their friendship turns into a genuine one.

title: Idhu Namma Aalu
subTitle: Gopalsamy, a poor graduate from a lower caste, assumes the identity of a higher caste to escape his financial struggles. However, complications arise when Banu, the daughter of a priest, marries him, unaware of his true social background.

title: Mannuketha Ponnu
subTitle: A man is very loyal towards his master who has also raised him. When his master's daughter returns to the village, the two fall in love after initial hiccups.

title: Kadalora Kavithaigal
subTitle: A teacher's heart is captured by a rough criminal. She believes love can transform even the most difficult soul, and sets out to prove it through their unexpected romance.

title: Solla Thudikuthu Manasu
subTitle: Amidst the chaos of finding a woman named Thenmozhi, Thillainathan, a smart young man loses everything from his new job at a bank to his beloved family.

title: Simmasanam
subTitle: Sakthivel and Thangarasu are stepbrothers who don't get along with each other. Their differences become more apparent as they start finding out their father's killer.

title: Iyyappaswamy
subTitle: Bringing the best in cinema.

title: Vetri
subTitle: Vijay loves challenges and goes to any limit to win them. But one such challenge lands him in prison on a murder charge, as he was used as a pawn to kill his professor.

title: Selva
subTitle: Selva become friends with Kamini, a minister's daughter. However, when she gets kidnapped by a terrorist group, he strives to rescue her.

title: Soori
subTitle: Soori

title: Maattrraan
subTitle: A pair of conjoined twins strive to save their father's flourishing business from a spy. However, just before the spy is killed, they make a shocking revelation that may affect their lives forever.

title: Aayiram Kannudaiyal
subTitle: Devotees offer their worship to Lord Shiva and Goddess Parvati. Later, when they begin to face adversities, Goddess Parvati comes to their aid.

title: Kumbakkarai Thangaiah
subTitle: Mangamma, who is in love with Thangaiya, is distraught while he faces a tough predicament owing to a disagreement in their village.

title: Thalayatti Bommaigal
subTitle: Mari, a rickshaw driver, finds an innocent child on the road and brings him home. He hires a lady caretaker, leading his lover to misunderstand and decide to leave him.

title: Udan Pirappu
subTitle: Best friends Sathya and Viji are against selling their colony to a land grabber. Their friendship is put to the test after Viji falls in love with Sumathi and marries her.
